rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (6/10) and make substantively the same assessment: strong full-stack and distributed-systems experience, but missing explicit evidence of experimentation/feature-flag/AI-growth platforms. The wording differs (reordered language list, different OSS tools named) but these are reworded restatements of the same underlying facts about the same candidate, well within ordinary run-to-run noise. No concern, score change, or shift in reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to James Smith.
